name: Google Drive
description: Access and manage files in Google Drive from your workflows.

capabilities.name: list_files
capabilities.description: List files and folders in Google Drive

capabilities.name: upload_file
capabilities.description: Upload a file to Google Drive

capabilities.name: download_file
capabilities.description: Download a file from Google Drive

capabilities.name: share_file
capabilities.description: Share a file with specific users or make it public
